mapper.select: select ts.TEAM_CODE as teamCode, ts.WINS as wins, ts.LOSSES as losses, ts.PLAYOFF_RESULT as playoffResult, IFNULL(agg.pts, 0) as pts, IFNULL(agg.reb, 0) as reb, IFNULL(agg.ast, 0) as ast, IFNULL(agg.stl, 0) as stl, IFNULL(agg.blk, 0) as blk, IFNULL(agg.tov, 0) as tov from team_season ts left join ( select SUBSTRING_INDEX(PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) as team, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_SCORE) as pts, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_REB) as reb, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_ASS) as ast, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_STEAL) as stl, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_BLOCK) as blk, SUM(PLAYER_AVG_TURNOVER) as tov from player_stats where SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum} and PLAYER_TEAM is not null and PLAYER_TEAM <> '/' group by SUBSTRING_INDEX(PLAYER_TEAM, '->', -1) ) agg on agg.team = ts.TEAM_CODE where ts.SEASON_NUM = #{seasonNum} order by ts.WINS desc
